summary.title: Schedule Planning & Forecast Horizon
summary.generatedFrom: Published patterns, approved leave, training holds, qualifications, coverage minimums, visibility policies, and draft planning rules

forecastIssues.detail: Dispatcher coverage projected below minimum by 2.
forecastIssues.recommendation: Post VOT and prepare mandate queue if unfilled.

forecastIssues.detail: No EMD-qualified employee assigned to night shift.
forecastIssues.recommendation: Swap qualified employee or assign overtime.

forecastIssues.detail: Two radio-qualified employees in training during day shift.
forecastIssues.recommendation: Adjust training or generate coverage exception.

forecastIssues.detail: Short-day coverage gap connected to next night shift.
forecastIssues.recommendation: Review connected-shift mandation policy before posting.

recommendedActions.detail: Open windows have qualified volunteers or known VOT candidates.
Forecast projects mandate risk after VOT window closes.
Projected schedule lacks required certified coverage.
Approved leave creates under-minimum periods in forecast horizon.

rules: Forecasts are preview-only until authenticated scheduling writes are enabled.
Pattern projection should never publish directly without supervisor/admin review.
Planning output should feed draft planning, conflict detection, OT posting, and mandation queues.
